LAW AND MOTION 301, JAN-21-2026 RE: DEFENDANT TESLA INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TESLA INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED AND THE CASE IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND DELIVER TO DEPT. 301 A PAPER COPY OF THE PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)
